module.name: Dance Training
module.description: A structured training module for high-energy, flow-based, and EDM-inspired dance styles.

dance_breakdance.name: Breakdance
dance_breakdance.description: A high-energy style featuring power moves, spins, freezes, and stalls.

dance_contact_staff_flow.name: Contact Staff Flow
dance_contact_staff_flow.description: Master the art of balance, rolling, and fluid motion with a contact staff.

dance_cutting_shapes.name: Cutting Shapes
dance_cutting_shapes.description: Quick footwork techniques used in tech shuffle and Melbourne shuffle.

dance_dubstep_glitch.name: Dubstep & Glitch Dance
dance_dubstep_glitch.description: Slow-motion, popping, and robotic isolation movement synced with bass music.

dance_fan_dancing.name: Fan Dancing & Silk Flow
dance_fan_dancing.description: Create high-energy visual effects with fans, silk veils, and LED props.

dance_freestyle_rave.name: Freestyle Rave
dance_freestyle_rave.description: Unstructured, highly rhythmic personal dance style for raves.

dance_gloving_tutting.name: Gloving & Tutting
dance_gloving_tutting.description: Beat-synced, intricate finger and hand movements used in EDM dance.

dance_industrial_dance.name: Industrial Dance
dance_industrial_dance.description: Heavy, mechanical, and stomp-based movement inspired by cyber-goth styles.

dance_jumpstyle_hardstyle.name: Jumpstyle & Hardstyle
dance_jumpstyle_hardstyle.description: High-intensity kicks and bounces synchronized to fast beats.

dance_liquid_dance.name: Liquid Dance
dance_liquid_dance.description: Smooth, wave-like movements that create an illusion of continuous motion.

dance_poi_spinning.name: Poi Spinning
dance_poi_spinning.description: A dance flow art focusing on circles, tracers, and rhythmic hand coordination.

dance_breakdance_basic_toprock_moves.name: Basic Toprock Moves
dance_breakdance_basic_toprock_moves.description: Master the foundational steps of breakdancing with proper posture and rhythm.

cards.title: Side Step
cards.description: A basic side-to-side movement that sets the rhythm for more complex footwork.
bulletpoints: Step side to side while maintaining a slight bounce
Keep arms relaxed and engaged
Move to the beat to create flow
cards.summaryText: Lock in groove with steady side steps and relaxed arms riding the beat.

cards.title: Crossover Step
cards.description: A dynamic movement where one foot crosses over the other in sync with the beat.
bulletpoints: Step forward and cross one foot over the other
Use your arms to guide the motion
Stay light on your feet for quick transitions
cards.summaryText: Cross through the beat with nimble foot switches anchored by active arms.

dance_breakdance_freeze_techniques.name: Freeze Techniques
dance_breakdance_freeze_techniques.description: Learn how to hold dynamic poses and freezes to punctuate breakdance sequences.

cards.title: Baby Freeze
cards.description: A foundational freeze where the body rests on one elbow for stability.
bulletpoints: Plant one elbow into your side for support
Lean forward and balance using your head
Keep legs tucked for better control
cards.summaryText: Lock into the baby freeze by bracing elbow, head, and tucked legs together.

cards.title: Shoulder Freeze
cards.description: A more advanced pose where the body is balanced on one shoulder.
bulletpoints: Roll onto your shoulder and plant your arm for stability
Engage core muscles to hold position
Use opposite leg to balance and create a dynamic shape
cards.summaryText: Drive core tension while balancing on one shoulder for a sharp power freeze.

dance_contact_staff_flow_advanced_flouri.name: Advanced Flourishes
dance_contact_staff_flow_advanced_flouri.description: Learn intricate staff movements that enhance style and fluidity.

cards.title: Neck Wrap
cards.description: A seamless transition where the staff wraps around the neck before being caught.
bulletpoints: Start with a slow spin and guide the staff behind your head
Tuck your chin slightly to allow the wrap
Catch the staff smoothly without disrupting its motion
cards.summaryText: Glide the staff around your neck and reclaim it without breaking flow.

cards.title: Aerial Release
cards.description: A dynamic trick where the staff is released mid-air and caught with precision.
bulletpoints: Use controlled force to flick the staff upwards
Keep your eyes on the staff at all times
Time your catch to continue the movement fluidly
cards.summaryText: Launch the staff skyward and snag it clean to keep the combo alive.

dance_contact_staff_flow_spins_and_trans.name: Spins & Transitions
dance_contact_staff_flow_spins_and_trans.description: Master continuous spinning techniques and seamless transitions.

cards.title: Continuous Wrist Spin
cards.description: A fluid wrist-based spin that maintains momentum.
bulletpoints: Keep the grip relaxed to allow free rotation
Use subtle wrist flicks to maintain speed
Practice switching hands smoothly
cards.summaryText: Let the staff whirl on loose wrists while hand switches stay effortless.

cards.title: Figure Eight Pass
cards.description: A transition where the staff flows through a figure-eight motion between hands.
bulletpoints: Engage your core to guide the movement
Use wrist rotations for better fluidity
Practice both clockwise and counterclockwise motions
cards.summaryText: Flow through figure eights, trading hands to keep transitions silky smooth.

dance_cutting_shapes_heel_toe_variations.name: Heel-Toe Variations
dance_cutting_shapes_heel_toe_variations.description: Master the fundamental heel-toe movements used in shuffle and cutting shapes styles.

cards.title: Basic Heel-Toe Step
cards.description: Learn the essential heel-toe motion to create smooth shuffle movements.
bulletpoints: Lift one heel while placing weight on the opposite toe
Switch feet in sync with the beat
Maintain a low stance for better control
cards.summaryText: Drive heel-and-toe swaps low to the floor so shuffles glide effortlessly.

cards.title: Reverse Heel-Toe Slide
cards.description: A reverse movement technique to add style to your footwork.
bulletpoints: Push forward with your heel while pulling back with the opposite toe
Keep weight balanced between both feet
Use subtle knee bends for better flow
cards.summaryText: Reverse the rocker by pushing heel and toe opposite ways for sleek slides.

dance_cutting_shapes_speed_training.name: Speed Training
dance_cutting_shapes_speed_training.description: Develop agility and control for faster cutting shapes movement sequences.

cards.title: Tempo Drills
cards.description: Increase foot speed while maintaining balance and control.
bulletpoints: Start slow and gradually increase speed
Focus on landing softly to avoid impact stress
Keep core engaged for better stability
cards.summaryText: Build tempo step-by-step so speed rises without losing balance.

cards.title: High-Speed Foot Switches
cards.description: Rapidly alternate foot positions to create an illusion of floating movement.
bulletpoints: Keep feet close to the ground to minimize effort
Use ankle control to switch directions seamlessly
Stay in sync with the beat to maintain rhythm
cards.summaryText: Snap rapid foot switches close to the floor to keep the shuffle floating.

dance_dubstep_glitch_bass_drop_isolation.name: Bass Drop Isolations
dance_dubstep_glitch_bass_drop_isolation.description: Master controlled isolations and sharp hits that match the intensity of bass drops in dubstep tracks.

cards.title: Chest Pop
cards.description: A sudden, sharp chest movement that accentuates bass-heavy beats.
bulletpoints: Contract and release chest muscles in sync with the bass hit
Maintain a slight bend in the knees for better control
Exaggerate movement for stronger impact
cards.summaryText: Blast the chest hit right on the drop for a crisp dubstep accent.

cards.title: Robotic Snap
cards.description: Quick, robotic movements that punctuate glitches in the music.
bulletpoints: Use short, controlled arm and hand movements
Lock joints momentarily for an instant freeze effect
Focus on exaggerated stops to enhance illusion
cards.summaryText: Snap into robotic locks so every glitch reads like a strobe cut.

dance_dubstep_glitch_slow_motion_effects.name: Slow Motion Effects
dance_dubstep_glitch_slow_motion_effects.description: Learn how to create the illusion of slow-motion movement to match dubstep's halftime sections.

cards.title: Drag Step
cards.description: A technique that simulates the feeling of moving underwater in slow motion.
bulletpoints: Slow down each movement while maintaining smoothness
Use exaggerated arm swings to create weight illusion
Sync motion perfectly with slow breakdowns in the music
cards.summaryText: Stretch every drag step into syrupy motion that matches halftime drops.

cards.title: Frame-by-Frame Control
cards.description: Breaking down movement into separate 'frames' to simulate a stop-motion effect.
bulletpoints: Hold each position for a brief second before transitioning
Use precise pauses to mimic video frame rates
Focus on finger and hand movements for added detail
cards.summaryText: Click through micro-pauses like stop motion to sell the slo-mo illusion.

dance_fan_dancing_precision_fan_techniqu.name: Precision Fan Techniques
dance_fan_dancing_precision_fan_techniqu.description: Learn precise fan control, wrist articulation, and dynamic fan openings for maximum visual effect.

cards.title: Snap Open
cards.description: A quick wrist flick to open the fan instantly with a strong visual impact.
bulletpoints: Hold the fan loosely before the flick
Use a sharp, controlled wrist movement
Ensure full extension for maximum effect
cards.summaryText: Snap the fan open with a crisp flick so the reveal lands like a spotlight.

cards.title: Wrist Twist Flourish
cards.description: A rotational movement that creates a fluid spinning motion with the fan.
bulletpoints: Rotate the wrist smoothly while holding the fan
Use small circles to maintain momentum
Experiment with both clockwise and counterclockwise motions
cards.summaryText: Roll gentle wrist circles to keep the fan gliding in endless flourishes.

dance_fan_dancing_veil_twirls.name: Veil Twirls
dance_fan_dancing_veil_twirls.description: Master elegant and dramatic veil twirling techniques to enhance flow and expression.

cards.title: Basic Veil Twirl
cards.description: A smooth and controlled twirl to create flowing veil movements.
bulletpoints: Keep the arms extended while twirling
Maintain a relaxed grip on the veil
Use breath control to enhance fluidity
cards.summaryText: Float the veil on long arm lines while breath keeps the twirl buttery.

cards.title: Overhead Swirls
cards.description: A circular motion above the head for dramatic veil movement.
bulletpoints: Lift the arms and keep the veil extended
Move in a controlled circular motion
Ensure even weight distribution for a balanced effect
cards.summaryText: Sweep overhead arcs to paint dramatic circles in the air.

dance_freestyle_rave_body_bounce_rhythm.name: Body Bounce Rhythm
dance_freestyle_rave_body_bounce_rhythm.description: Master rhythmic bouncing techniques to stay in sync with high-energy rave beats.

cards.title: Basic Bounce Step
cards.description: A continuous up-and-down motion that helps maintain a fluid groove.
bulletpoints: Keep knees soft to absorb movement
Bounce in time with the beat
Use slight weight shifts for variations
cards.summaryText: Ride the beat with springy knees and gentle shifts to stay locked in.

cards.title: Dynamic Bounce Variations
cards.description: Add intensity and foot patterns to the bounce for a unique freestyle style.
bulletpoints: Increase bounce height for emphasis
Integrate small hops for variation
Experiment with side-to-side weight shifts
cards.summaryText: Layer hops and accents on the bounce to dial up freestyle energy.

dance_freestyle_rave_flow_transitions.name: Flow Transitions
dance_freestyle_rave_flow_transitions.description: Learn how to move seamlessly between different dance styles without breaking rhythm.

cards.title: Hand to Foot Sync
cards.description: Transition movements between upper and lower body flow.
bulletpoints: Use arm waves to guide foot movements
Keep shoulders relaxed for better fluidity
Time transitions with beat changes
cards.summaryText: Blend upper and lower flow so switches ride the beat without bumps.

cards.title: Tempo Shift Adjustment
cards.description: Adjust speed and intensity smoothly to match changes in the music.
bulletpoints: Slow down or speed up movement gradually
Use pauses and accents to mark transitions
Stay aware of the music's progression
cards.summaryText: Ease through tempo shifts with measured pauses and controlled ramps.

dance_gloving_tutting_box_tutting_patter.name: Box Tutting Patterns
dance_gloving_tutting_box_tutting_patter.description: Master the structured, geometric hand and arm positions that define tutting.

cards.title: Basic Box Formation
cards.description: Learn the fundamental hand positioning for creating box shapes.
bulletpoints: Keep fingers straight and locked
Maintain sharp 90-degree angles
Use slow, controlled movements
cards.summaryText: Frame crisp boxes with locked fingers and steady pace.

cards.title: Box Rotation Transitions
cards.description: Practice moving box formations while maintaining clean angles.
bulletpoints: Rotate boxes smoothly without breaking structure
Use elbow control for fluidity
Experiment with different speed variations
cards.summaryText: Swivel box angles cleanly by steering from elbows without losing shape.

dance_gloving_tutting_finger_isolations.name: Finger Isolations
dance_gloving_tutting_finger_isolations.description: Develop precision control over individual fingers for complex tutting and gloving sequences.

cards.title: Wave Isolation
cards.description: Control each finger independently to create seamless wave-like effects.
bulletpoints: Move fingers in a controlled sequence
Ensure smooth motion between each joint
Practice slow-to-fast transitions for illusion effect
cards.summaryText: Chain finger waves joint by joint for silky gloving illusions.

cards.title: Knuckle Rolls
cards.description: Use knuckle-based finger rolls to create advanced illusionary effects.
bulletpoints: Engage finger joints individually
Focus on creating a fluid rolling effect
Combine with wrist movements for added complexity
cards.summaryText: Roll knuckles in sequence and layer wrist turns to amplify the effect.

dance_industrial_dance_arm_synchronizati.name: Arm Synchronization
dance_industrial_dance_arm_synchronizati.description: Master precise, robotic arm movements in sync with industrial beats.

cards.title: Linear Arm Strikes
cards.description: Sharp, controlled arm movements with precise stopping points.
bulletpoints: Keep arms stiff and movements sharp
Use shoulder and elbow control for precision
Match each strike to the beat for better sync
cards.summaryText: Hit robotic arm strikes that freeze perfectly on every beat.

cards.title: Synchronized Double Strikes
cards.description: Moving both arms in unison while maintaining mechanical precision.
bulletpoints: Start with slow, controlled movement before increasing speed
Keep motions robotic with clear stopping points
Engage core for stability and balance
cards.summaryText: Drive both arms in lockstep with crisp stops for industrial precision.

dance_industrial_dance_footwork_patterns.name: Footwork Patterns
dance_industrial_dance_footwork_patterns.description: Develop powerful, rhythmic stomp-based footwork sequences.

cards.title: Stomp Step
cards.description: A strong, grounded stomp movement performed in sync with industrial beats.
bulletpoints: Keep knees slightly bent for shock absorption
Land on the beat for maximum impact
Use controlled energy to avoid excessive strain
cards.summaryText: Drive grounded stomps into the beat while staying cushioned and precise.

cards.title: Cross Stomp Transition
cards.description: A footwork transition combining stomp steps with side-to-side movement.
bulletpoints: Shift weight smoothly between feet
Time each movement precisely with the music
Experiment with different tempos to build endurance
cards.summaryText: Cross-step your stomps to swing side-to-side without losing power.

dance_jumpstyle_hardstyle_kicking_sequen.name: Kicking Sequences
dance_jumpstyle_hardstyle_kicking_sequen.description: Learn the foundational and advanced kick patterns for Jumpstyle and Hardstyle dance.

cards.title: Basic Jump Kick
cards.description: A simple alternating kick executed in rhythm with the beat.
bulletpoints: Kick forward with one foot while hopping off the other
Keep your core engaged for balance
Maintain a steady pace with the beat
cards.summaryText: Alternate kicks over driving beats while core control keeps you upright.

cards.title: Cross-Kick Transition
cards.description: A more advanced variation that involves crossing the legs mid-air.
bulletpoints: Lift one leg and cross it over the other while jumping
Land softly and immediately transition into the next kick
Use ankle and knee control to avoid impact stress
cards.summaryText: Cross legs mid-air and rebound gently to chain the next kick.

dance_jumpstyle_hardstyle_stamina_drills.name: Stamina Drills
dance_jumpstyle_hardstyle_stamina_drills.description: Develop endurance and control for high-intensity Jumpstyle and Hardstyle performances.

cards.title: Tempo Control Drill
cards.description: Adjust speed and energy levels to build long-lasting endurance.
bulletpoints: Start slow and gradually increase tempo
Focus on controlled breathing to avoid fatigue
Use arm movements to maintain overall balance
cards.summaryText: Ramp tempo carefully while breath and arms steady the engine.

cards.title: Non-Stop Kick Combo
cards.description: A continuous cycle of Jumpstyle kicks to improve stamina and consistency.
bulletpoints: Perform alternating kicks for a set duration
Maintain form even as fatigue sets in
Increase complexity by adding knee lifts or spins
cards.summaryText: Cycle nonstop kicks with clean form to build jumpstyle endurance.

dance_liquid_dance_hand_glides.name: Hand Glides
dance_liquid_dance_hand_glides.description: Master smooth and continuous hand gliding techniques for liquid dance illusions.

cards.title: Basic Hand Glide
cards.description: A foundational movement that creates the illusion of hands sliding through air.
bulletpoints: Keep fingers slightly curved for a natural effect
Move hands in a continuous circular motion
Maintain even speed to enhance illusion
cards.summaryText: Practice smooth circles with relaxed fingers and steady tempo to sell the floating-hand illusion.

cards.title: Interweaving Hand Glide
cards.description: A more complex hand glide technique incorporating figure-eight movements.
bulletpoints: Alternate hands for a seamless effect
Use elbow movement to enhance fluidity
Slow down transitions for better control
cards.summaryText: Layer figure-eight paths with elbow-led transitions to keep alternating hands flowing as one stream.

dance_liquid_dance_wave_techniques.name: Wave Techniques
dance_liquid_dance_wave_techniques.description: Learn how to create continuous wave illusions through the arms and body.

cards.title: Basic Arm Wave
cards.description: A smooth arm motion that mimics the flow of an energy wave.
bulletpoints: Start with fingers and move through each joint
Keep movements controlled and fluid
Use both arms for symmetrical effect
cards.summaryText: Drill joint-by-joint articulation from fingertips to shoulder so the arm carries a continuous wave.

cards.title: Chest Wave
cards.description: A full-body wave starting from the chest and rolling through the spine.
bulletpoints: Engage core muscles to guide movement
Use small shoulder shifts for better transition
Focus on controlled speed for a better illusion
cards.summaryText: Link core engagement with subtle shoulder cues so the wave ripples cleanly down the torso.

dance_poi_spinning_butterfly_moves.name: Butterfly Moves
dance_poi_spinning_butterfly_moves.description: Master symmetrical and dynamic poi movements with butterfly-style spins.

cards.title: Basic Butterfly
cards.description: A simple inward butterfly movement where both poi move in opposite directions in front of the body.
bulletpoints: Keep wrists close together for better control
Focus on maintaining even poi spacing
Practice with slow movements before increasing speed
cards.summaryText: Coordinate inward swings with tight wrists and even spacing before layering on speed.

cards.title: Split-Time Butterfly
cards.description: A variation where one poi moves slightly before the other, creating a staggered effect.
bulletpoints: Introduce slight delay in one poi movement
Maintain relaxed wrists for better fluidity
Gradually increase speed for smoother execution
cards.summaryText: Offset the poi timing subtly while keeping wrists relaxed so the staggered pattern stays silky.

dance_poi_spinning_weave_patterns.name: Weave Patterns
dance_poi_spinning_weave_patterns.description: Learn the foundational and advanced weave movements to enhance poi spinning flow.

cards.title: Three-Beat Weave
cards.description: A fundamental poi weave pattern that involves crossing the arms and alternating sides.
bulletpoints: Keep elbows loose to allow smooth transitions
Use controlled wrist movements for better accuracy
Start slow and increase speed gradually
cards.summaryText: Drill cross-body passes with relaxed elbows and precise wrists before ramping up tempo.

cards.title: Reverse Weave
cards.description: A movement where the weave pattern is reversed, adding complexity to transitions.
bulletpoints: Begin with slow reverse motions before attempting full flow
Maintain rhythm and timing between both poi
Experiment with transitioning between forward and reverse weaves
cards.summaryText: Use deliberate reverse reps to sync timing, then blend forward-to-reverse transitions for seamless flow.
